Operation 'get_/sessions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about pagination parameters, authentication context, and specific fields returned. data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of meeting sessions with basic information
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of meeting sessions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all meeting sessions accessible to the authenticated user. Returns session summaries including session ID, title, date, duration, and participant count. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters. Each session object contains basic metadata but not full transcripts or highlights.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about pagination parameters, authentication context, and specific fields returned. message: Operation 'get_/sessions/{sessionId}' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is vague about what 'detailed information' includes. Added specificity about transcript inclusion, metadata fields, required parameters, return schema name, and authentication requirement. data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific meeting session
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific meeting session identified by sessionId. Returns full session details including transcript, metadata (date, duration, participants), and associated highlights. Requires the sessionId path parameter. Returns a SessionDetail object containing all session information. Requires authentication.
